en.afterQuoteBefore: Narrated Umm Farwah: The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) was asked: Which of the actions is best?
en.afterQuoteEmphasis: He replied: Observing prayer early in its period.
en.afterQuoteAfter: Al-Khuza'i narrated in his version from his aunt named Umm Farwah who took the oath of allegiance to the Prophet (ﷺ): He was questioned.

id.afterQuoteBefore: Umm Farwah berkata: Rasulullah SAW ditanya: "Amal apakah yang paling utama?"
id.afterQuoteAfter: Al-Khuza'i menyebutkan dalam haditsnya dari bibinya yang bernama Umm Farwah yang telah membai'at Nabi SAW: Beliau ditanya.
id.afterReference: Referensi: Hadits Sunan Abu Dawud No. 426 - Kitab Shalat
